ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency or company responsible */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the mission was launched */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outcome of the mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "mission_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the mission */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the mission in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES mission_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency or company */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., government, private) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the agency was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome (e.g., successful, partial failure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_code" TEXT /* Short code for the outcome (e.g., S, PF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the site is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the launch site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the launch site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission carrying the payload */,
  "payload_name" TEXT /* Name of the payload */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of payload (e.g., satellite, crewed spacecraft) */,
  "payload_mass" REAL /* Mass of the payload in kg */,
  "payload_volume" REAL /* Volume of the payload in cubic meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payloads_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecraft" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission using the spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_type" TEXT /* Type of spacecraft (e.g., satellite, crewed spacecraft) */,
  "spacecraft_mass" REAL /* Mass of the spacecraft in kg */,
  "spacecraft_volume" REAL /* Volume of the spacecraft in cubic meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spacecraft_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the mission */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mission was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency or company */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of missions for the agency or country */,
  "total_missions" INTEGER /* Total number of missions for the agency or country */,
  "successful_missions" INTEGER /* Number of successful missions for the agency or country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
